name: Hawaiian Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup chopped macadamia nuts or almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine water and pineapple juice.
3. Add egg, applesauce, sugar, salt, and yeast to the wet mixture.
4. Mix in the flour until dough forms.
5. Fold in chopped macadamia nuts or almonds and coconut (if using).
6. Shape dough into a loaf and place on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and crusty.
8. Remove from oven and let cool before slicing.
